title: rubus × baldensis
intro: Rubus × baldensis, also known as the Bald's raspberry, is a hybrid of the European raspberry (Rubus idaeus) and the fragrant raspberry (Rubus odoratus), and is a type of bramble that produces edible fruits and has medicinal properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues due to its high antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to reduce pain, swelling, and inflammation. The health benefits of Rubus × baldensis include its ability to support cardiovascular health, improve digestion, and act as an antiseptic to prevent infections. Rubus × baldensis can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or syrup to harness its medicinal properties, making it a popular choice in herbal medicine.
